description:
Hi Sam,

This is Jenna. The clasp on the sterling silver bracelet I ordered last spring snapped at the spring ring this week. The piece is otherwise in great shape. Could you repair or replace the clasp under the warranty? Happy to mail it back whenever you're ready.

Thanks,
Jenna
subject: Broken clasp on sterling silver bracelet — warranty repair

description:
Hi Sam,

Patricia here. One of the turquoise stones in my pendant has come loose in its bezel setting and rattles a little. I'd love to get it re-set before it falls out. Let me know what you need from me.

Thanks,
Patricia
subject: Loose turquoise stone in pendant bezel — re-set request

description:
Hi Sam,

Greg here. The sterling cuff I bought has tarnished quite a bit and lost its shine. Could you refinish and polish it for me? Would also appreciate any tips on keeping it from tarnishing again.

Thanks,
Greg
subject: Tarnished sterling cuff — refinish and polish request

description:
Hi Sam,

Rebecca here. My sterling silver ring is about a half size too tight after the holidays. Is resizing something you can do, and would it affect the stone setting? Let me know the turnaround.

Thanks,
Rebecca
subject: Sterling silver ring resize — half size up

description:
Hi Sam,

Tony here. The chain on my pendant necklace snapped near the clasp. It's a fine sterling box chain. Can it be soldered back together, or does it need replacing? Warranty claim if it qualifies.

Thanks,
Tony
subject: Snapped sterling box chain on pendant — repair or replace

description:
Hi Sam,

Monica here. I'd like to file a warranty claim on the silver cuff I purchased — the band has developed a hairline crack on the inside edge. It hasn't been dropped or bent. Please advise on next steps.

Thanks,
Monica
subject: Warranty claim — hairline crack in silver cuff band

description:
Hi Sam,

Derek here. The earring posts on the pair I ordered are bending too easily and one backing won't stay on. Could you reinforce or replace the posts? Happy to send both earrings in.

Thanks,
Derek
subject: Bent earring posts — reinforce or replace

description:
Hi Sam,

Martha here. The lobster clasp on my silver chain is sticking and hard to open. Could you replace it with a sturdier clasp during a service visit? Let me know the cost.

Thanks,
Martha
subject: Sticking lobster clasp on silver chain — clasp replacement

description:
Hi Sam,

Alan here. A small stone in my inlay ring has chipped at one corner. Can it be replaced to match, and is that covered under the warranty? I can mail it whenever convenient.

Thanks,
Alan
subject: Chipped inlay stone in ring — warranty stone replacement

description:
Hi Sam,

Carolyn here. My sterling silver pendant has darkened in the engraved grooves and I'd like it cleaned and refinished. Would also love a quote on adding a protective coating.

Thanks,
Carolyn
subject: Refinish darkened sterling pendant engraving

description:
Hi Sam,

Vincent here. The cuff you made for me has loosened over the band and no longer holds its shape on my wrist. Could you re-tension or adjust the fit? Warranty claim if applicable.

Thanks,
Vincent
subject: Cuff lost its shape — re-tension and fit adjustment

description:
Hi Sam,

Claudia here. The bezel around the stone on my pendant has lifted slightly on one side. I'd like it tightened so the stone is secure again. Please let me know the repair timeline.

Thanks,
Claudia
subject: Lifted bezel on pendant — tighten stone setting

description:
Hi Sam,

Miguel here. The fine chain on my necklace has a kink and a couple of links look stretched. Can you repair the links or replace that section of chain? Happy to send it in.

Thanks,
Miguel
subject: Kinked and stretched links on silver chain — repair

description:
Hi Sam,

Marcus here. I'd like to resize my sterling band ring down by one size — it spins on my finger. Would resizing affect the hand-stamped pattern on the band?

Thanks,
Marcus
subject: Resize sterling band ring down one size

description:
Hi Sam,

Diana here. The hinge on my silver bangle has worn loose and the bangle pops open. Could you repair or replace the hinge mechanism? Let me know if it's covered under warranty.

Thanks,
Diana
subject: Worn hinge on silver bangle — hinge repair

description:
Hi Sam,

Roy here. The stone in my ring has gone cloudy and I'm not sure if it's surface buildup or damage. Could you take a look and clean or replace it as needed? Warranty claim if it's a defect.

Thanks,
Roy
subject: Cloudy stone in ring — inspection and cleaning

description:
Hi Sam,

Steve here. The spring ring clasp on my sterling necklace has stopped springing back and won't close. Could you replace the clasp? Happy to mail the necklace in this week.

Thanks,
Steve
subject: Spring ring clasp won't close — clasp replacement

description:
Hi Sam,

Nina here. My silver cuff has picked up a deep scratch across the front face. Would you be able to polish it out and refinish the surface? Let me know turnaround and cost.

Thanks,
Nina
subject: Scratched silver cuff face — polish and refinish

description:
Hi Sam,

Sandra here. The prongs holding the stone on my ring feel like they've loosened and the stone moves slightly. Could you re-tip or tighten the prongs before it comes out?

Thanks,
Sandra
subject: Loose prongs on ring stone — re-tip setting

description:
Hi Sam,

David here. My silver chain bracelet snapped at a solder joint mid-link. I'd like it repaired and the rest of the joints checked. Filing a warranty claim if this is a manufacturing defect.

Thanks,
David
subject: Snapped solder joint on chain bracelet — warranty repair

description:
Hi Sam,

Frank here. The engraving on my anniversary band has worn smooth and I'd like it re-cut, plus a full polish. Is re-engraving something you offer on existing pieces?

Thanks,
Frank
subject: Re-cut worn engraving on anniversary band

description:
Hi Sam,

Lorraine here. One of the drop earrings is missing its ear wire after the loop opened up. Could you replace the ear wire and check the loop on the matching earring?

Thanks,
Lorraine
subject: Missing ear wire on drop earring — replace and check pair
